metadata.description: Evaluate and compare Claude Code brainstorming skills against a frozen creativity-psychology problem set, with a blinded pairwise LLM judge and an Elo leaderboard.

plugins.name: brainstormingbench
plugins.description: Slash commands (/brainstormingbench:battle, :run, :judge, :metrics, :leaderboard), the `brainstorm-runner` subagent for parallel multi-system evaluation, and the `brainstorming-eval` skill that loads when the session is working on creativity benchmarking.
